title: Imaging-101: Benchmarking LLM Coding Agents on Scientific Computational Imaging

text.extraction_method: pdftotext -layout; UTF-8 text with page breaks preserved

official_project_page.capture_note: The page is a client-rendered Next.js shell. The raw HTML is preserved; static visible-text extraction contains only the title and loading message and is not treated as substantive source text.

huggingface_release.acquisition_scope: The immutable revision metadata and complete 6,022-path sibling inventory are archived. Four function-result metadata tables were hydrated, and the hash-aware official downloader fetched and verified all eight ct_sparse_view assets (3,965,104 bytes) for representative reference execution. The remaining payload was inventoried but not fully downloaded.

stale_github_repository.boundary: This stale URL remains in the pinned Hugging Face README and returned HTTP 404 at acquisition and deep-review time. It is not the GitHub URL printed in the paper's Appendix A.

paper_github_repository.relation_to_paper: The repository's sole commit predates immutable arXiv v1 and is treated as the inspectable paper-time candidate release.
paper_github_repository.repository_tests: python -m pytest -q tests: 11 passed in 0.82s; these are CLI/asset tests, not the paper-described task-level tests.

verification.pdfinfo_title: Imaging-101: Benchmarking LLM Coding Agents on Scientific Computational Imaging
verification.text_inspection: Non-empty extraction inspected at the title/abstract, task inventory, solver tables, and final appendix through the last page break; equations, tables, and page boundaries are present.
verification.source_archive_integrity: gzip archive listed successfully; 19 members include iccp26.tex, section TeX files, bibliography, and figures.

review_boundary: The deep review establishes immutable-paper reading, source/package inspection, release-closure audit, one representative reference execution, and planted evidence-boundary/metric probes. It does not validate the unreleased task tests, reproduce the paper's model matrices, independently verify every task's physics, or establish expertise transfer, reliability, professional utility, production fitness, or readiness.
